results.rendered_html:
avacana a. [na. ba.] Not speaking, silent, speechless; śakuṃtalā sādhvasādavacanā tiṣṭhati  Ś. 1. 
— naṃ [abhāve na. ta.]
1 Absence of assertion, silence, taciturnity; avacane'gniṣṭomaḥ  Kāty. 
2 Censure, blame, reproof; ˚kara a. not doing what one is bid, disobedient.
